scripts.test:node: mkdir -p test-result coverage/node-v8 && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=coverage/node-v8 node --import tsx --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=junit --test-reporter-destination=test-result/node-junit.xml tests/*.test.ts && npx c8 report --temp-directory coverage/node-v8 --reporter=lcovonly --report-dir test-result/node-coverage
scripts.test:bun: mkdir -p test-result test-result/bun-coverage && bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=text --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=test-result/bun-coverage --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=test-result/bun-junit.xml tests/*.test.ts
